scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @facility/domain && npm run build --workspace @facility/contracts && npm run build --workspace @facility/ui && npm run build --workspace @facility/jobs && npm run build --workspace @facility/db
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @facility/api && npm run build --workspace @facility/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
